codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the premature Mission-complete rendering regression by keeping both Mission Control and the runtime status panel pending until validation actually settles.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed scrutiny report, mission validation contract, fix-session transcript skeleton, worker handoff, commit diff, current Mission Control/runtime sources, and regression tests. Result: pass — the original completion-gating blocker is resolved and no new in-scope issues were identified.
